# The CNN Reckoning & Trump’s Treasury Sweepstakes

**Source:** inputs/saved_html/=UTF-8qThe_CNN_Reckoning_&_Trump=E2=80=99s_Treasury_Sweepstakes=_Mon,_11_Nov_2024_20-02-26_+0000_1931cd2209d15444.html
**Processed:** 2025-08-24T19:12:18.063763

Art’s November Surprise, Trickle-Down Zazonomics, Brinkley’s Hard Truths
 ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌  ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

First up today, **Dylan Byers** digs into CNN’s looming post-election transformation as network boss **Mark Thompson** *finally* kicks off his long-awaited, high-stakes digital overhaul of the declining brand—a grueling process that will include the culling of *hundreds* of jobs.     Plus, below the fold: **Bill Cohan** scrutinizes the **Trump** 2.0 treasury secretary shortlist. **Marion Maneker** evaluates the art world’s cautious optimism surrounding the upcoming November auctions. **John Heilemann** chronicles the Democratic Party’s internal reckoning. On *Somebody’s Gotta Win* , **Tara Palmeri** huddles up with **Peter Hamby** and media executive **Mosheh Oinounou** to relitigate the **Harris** campaign’s missteps. On *Impolitic* , John is joined by political and cultural historian **Douglas Brinkley** to assess how much **Biden** is to blame for Trump sailing to victory. And on *The Powers That Be* , **Jon Kelly** and Peter discuss how the media can regain its credibility during a second Trump administration and whether *The Washington Post* ’s return-to-office mandate is really a covert effort to purge its ranks. | |  | | [CNN’s Existential Post-Election Season](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSE5CdmtNOEFjdkR3Y0NzUkpfQT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvY25ucy1leGlzdGVudGlhbC1wb3N0LWVsZWN0aW9uLXNlYXNvbi8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRoZStEYWlseStDb3VyYW50Ky0rU1VCU0NSSUJFUlMrJTI4MTElMkYxMSUyRjI0JTI5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jdXN0b21lci5pbyIsImludGVybmFsIjoiZjZjNjA2MTdkYTQyYWJkMTJhIiwibGlua19pZCI6MTk2OTE1NH0/9f35f840de4ff4ab6c9842637133e6c857476cebe868dc0dcd8690a57306bda4) | | DYLAN BYERS | | With the election in the rearview, C.E.O. Mark Thompson will finally implement his true transformation plan at the network—including the culling of hundreds of jobs. Many of CNN’s own journalists, plenty of whom were blinded by Trump’s significant victory, have evinced similar naiveté about their own fates. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Trump Treasury Prophecies & Trickle-Down Zazonomics](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSE5CdmtNOEFjdkR3Y0NzUkpfQT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvdHJ1bXAtdHJlYXN1cnktc2VjcmV0YXJ5LWZhdm9yaXRlcy10cmlja2xlLWRvd24temF6b25vbWljcy8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRoZStEYWlseStDb3VyYW50Ky0rU1VCU0NSSUJFUlMrJTI4MTElMkYxMSUyRjI0JTI5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jdXN0b21lci5pbyIsImludGVybmFsIjoiZjZjNjA2MTdkYTQyYWJkMTJhIiwibGlua19pZCI6MTk2OTk0N30/159165754d1a91a6b9937ef9282afbe061580dfad9261c9314a98090f870fa47) | | WILLIAM D. COHAN | | News and notes on two of Wall Street’s hottest topics: speculation regarding Trump’s forthcoming treasury secretary (Steve? Gary? Paulson?) and the latest debt-servicing tea leaves in Zazworld. | |  | | [The Art Market’s New November Math](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSE5CdmtNOEFjdkR3Y0NzUkpfQT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvdGhlLWFydC1tYXJrZXRzLW5ldy1mYWxsLWF1Y3Rpb24tbWF0aC8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRoZStEYWlseStDb3VyYW50Ky0rU1VCU0NSSUJFUlMrJTI4MTElMkYxMSUyRjI0JTI5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jdXN0b21lci5pbyIsImludGVybmFsIjoiZjZjNjA2MTdkYTQyYWJkMTJhIiwibGlua19pZCI6MTk3MDI1N30/9c075234f5d9c243bf598e0fbab3c9746cf54223a218a20216d79fa7447a8f98) | | MARION MANEKER | | A rise in the competition for third-party guarantees and attractive presale estimates indicate that dealers and consignors are feeling good about the upcoming auctions, including Mica Ertegun’s $95 million Magritte, Sid Bass’s $50 million Ruscha, and a “value proposition” $20 million Basquiat. | |  | | [The Post-Harris Blamescape & Dem Reckoning Tea Leaves](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSE5CdmtNOEFjdkR3Y0NzUkpfQT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvdGhlLXBvc3QtaGFycmlzLWxvc3MtYmxhbWVzY2FwZS1kZW1vY3JhdC1yZWNrb25pbmctdGVhLWxlYXZlcy8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRoZStEYWlseStDb3VyYW50Ky0rU1VCU0NSSUJFUlMrJTI4MTElMkYxMSUyRjI0JTI5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jdXN0b21lci5pbyIsImludGVybmFsIjoiZjZjNjA2MTdkYTQyYWJkMTJhIiwibGlua19pZCI6MTk3MTAxMX0/050b893c3b92a0fe70cfe169433d368256a657cfecd1ea16748e4a0c20772cbe) | | JOHN HEILEMANN | | News and notes and fresh reporting on the current targets of professional Democratic rage: Harris, Team K, Biden, Biden’s people, wokeism and more. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Election Hangover, With Mosheh Oinounou & Peter Hamby](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSE5CdmtNOEFjdkR3Y0NzUkpfQT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9wdWNrLm5ld3MvcG9kY2FzdF9lcGlzb2RlL2VsZWN0aW9uLWhhbmdvdmVyLXdpdGgtbW9zaGVoLW9pbm91bm91LWFuZC1wZXRlci1oYW1ieS8_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRoZStEYWlseStDb3VyYW50Ky0rU1VCU0NSSUJFUlMrJTI4MTElMkYxMSUyRjI0JTI5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jdXN0b21lci5pbyIsImludGVybmFsIjoiZjZjNjA2MTdkYTQyYWJkMTJhIiwibGlua19pZCI6MTk3MTM4OX0/c544d617a05f08f1d2b5a277cca1e403249720e8efb3ac29f46ee43d11cfbe66) | | TARA PALMERI | | Tara and her Puck colleague Peter Hamby join Mosheh Oinounou on his podcast, ‘Mo News,’ to discuss the fallout of the 2024 presidential election. They break down the strategies of both parties throughout their campaigns, debate Kamala Harris’s missteps, and speculate on what’s next for Team Trump. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Douglas Brinkley: Extreme Incaution, Enemies Lists & The Age of Trump](https://email.puck.) | | JOHN HEILEMANN | | John is joined by political and cultural historian Douglas Brinkley to discuss the 2024 election and Donald Trump’s return to the White House. Brinkley explains the harsh impact of Kamala Harris’s defeat on Joe Biden’s legacy, and how Biden only has himself to blame; how Trump managed to increase his share of the vote countrywide; and why Harris’s extreme caution was her greatest weakness and Trump’s extreme incaution his greatest strength. | | | |  | | --- | |  | | [Media Monday: The CNN Reckoning & The Trump Effect](https://email.puck.) | | PETER HAMBY & JON KELLY | | Jon Kelly and Peter jump into a brief recap of last week’s Election Day surprises before diving into the future of the media industry under a second Trump administration. They tackle CNN’s hundreds of impending layoffs, the Washington Post’s eyebrow-raising return-to-work policy, how media at large has grown out of touch with modern politics, and more. | | | |  | | --- | | [Puck](https://email.puck.) | | |  |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | --- | | [Facebook](https://email.puck.news/e/c/eyJlbWFpbF9pZCI6ImRnVDJ4Z1lEQUt2UktxclJLZ0dUSE5CdmtNOEFjdkR3Y0NzUkpfQT0iLCJocmVmIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9mYWNlYm9vay5jb20vcHVja2RvdG5ld3M_dXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPVRoZStEYWlseStDb3VyYW50Ky0rU1VCU0NSSUJFUlMrJTI4MTElMkYxMSUyRjI0JTI5XHUwMDI2dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1jdXN0b21lci5pbyIsImludGVybmFsIjoiZjZjNjA2MTdkYTQyYWJkMTJhIiwibGlua19pZCI6MTB9/14925fcf1debdd3ebabcd354c33b4eb65dbee5701742d3a5de1e1b0782311cbc) | [Twitter](https://email.puck.) | [Instagram](https://email.puck.) | [LinkedIn](https://email.puck.) | | | |  | | --- | | Need help?
